document.title: JioGames Creator Network – Terms of Participation

sections.title: Nature of the Program
clauses: By submitting your details through the registration form, you are applying to be considered for participation in the JioGames Creator Network ("Program").
Participation in the Program is subject to evaluation and selection by JioGames at its sole discretion.
Submission of the form does not guarantee selection or access to JioGames Cloud.
JioGames may accept or reject any application without providing reasons.

sections.title: Access to JioGames Cloud
clauses: If selected, you may be granted limited, revocable access to JioGames Cloud through unique access codes ("Access Codes").
Such access is provided on an early access / promotional basis.
Such access may be subject to usage limitations, availability constraints, and technical conditions.
Such access does not constitute a sale, license grant, or transfer of ownership in any product or service.
JioGames reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue access at any time.

sections.title: Creator Participation & Content Expectations
obligations: Actively participate in the Program by creating and publishing original content featuring JioGames Cloud.
Showcase the platform's features, gameplay experience, and usability in an honest, non-disparaging and authentic manner.
Share such content across your active social media platforms (including but not limited to YouTube, Instagram, or similar platforms).
content_restrictions: Content must not be misleading, false, or factually incorrect.
Content must not be defamatory, disparaging, or harmful to JioGames or its products.
Content must not misrepresent features, pricing, availability, or capabilities of JioGames Cloud.
notes: Continued access to JioGames Cloud may be subject to your active participation in the Program.
JioGames may provide optional campaign guidelines, which you agree to reasonably adhere to.

sections.title: Non-Monetary Nature of Collaboration
clauses: This Program is a non-monetary collaboration.
No fees, payments, reimbursements, or monetary consideration shall be payable by JioGames.
Access to JioGames Cloud is the sole consideration for participation.
You agree that you shall not raise any claims for compensation, now or in the future, in relation to this Program.
You are free to exit the Program after giving 10 days advance notice in writing via email to ____________@jioblast.com.

sections.title: Content Ownership & Usage Rights
clauses: You retain ownership of the content created by you.
By participating in the Program, you grant JioGames an exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual license to use, reproduce, edit, adapt, publish, distribute, and publicly display your content.
JioGames may share or repost such content across Jio's platforms, marketing channels, and promotional materials.
This usage shall not require any additional approval or payment.

sections.title: Access Code Usage & Restrictions
restrictions: Access Codes are personal, non-transferable, and revocable.
Access Codes must not be shared, sold, sublicensed, or distributed in any manner.
Access Codes must not be used for any commercial exploitation beyond the intended purpose of the Program.
consequences_of_misuse: Immediate suspension or termination of access.
Removal from the Program without notice.

sections.title: Compliance & Disclosures
obligations: Comply with all applicable laws, regulations, and industry guidelines, including advertising and influencer disclosure norms.
Ensure that all content clearly and appropriately discloses the promotional nature of the collaboration, where required.
Comply with the policies and guidelines of relevant platforms such as YouTube and Instagram.
sole_responsibilities: Ensuring that your content does not infringe any third-party rights.
Obtaining any necessary permissions, licenses, or consents.

sections.title: Conduct & Reputation
clauses: You agree to maintain conduct that does not adversely affect the reputation of Jio.
JioGames reserves the right to suspend or terminate your participation for any reason at its sole discretion.
grounds_for_termination: Your content or behavior is deemed inappropriate, offensive, unlawful, or harmful.
Your actions negatively impact the brand, its users, or its partners.

sections.title: No Obligation & Discretion
jiogames_rights: Determine the nature and extent of access provided.
Modify, suspend, or discontinue the Program at any time.

sections.title: Termination & Revocation
clauses: JioGames may, at its sole discretion, revoke Access Codes.
JioGames may remove you from the Program.
JioGames may require modification or removal of non-compliant content.
Such actions may be taken without prior notice and without liability.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
not_liable_for: Any technical issues, service interruptions, or platform unavailability.
Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from participation in the Program.
sections.maximum_obligation: At most, Jio's obligation shall be limited to revocation or replacement of access, where applicable.

sections.title: Nature of Relationship
clauses: Your participation in the Program does not create any employment, partnership, or agency relationship.
Your participation does not grant any authority to represent or bind JioGames in any manner.

sections.title: Future Opportunities
sections.note: Participation in this Program does not guarantee such opportunities.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
clauses: By submitting your application and/or using the Access Code (if provided), you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms.
By submitting your application and/or using the Access Code (if provided), you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: Confidentiality & Governing Law
confidential_information_includes: Any communication including emails or messages from JioGames.
confidentiality_obligations: Not disclose, share, or make available such information to any third party without prior written consent of JioGames.
Use such information solely for the purposes of participation in the Program.
This obligation shall survive termination or exit from the Program.
sections.jurisdiction: Courts at New Delhi, India (exclusive jurisdiction)
